name: Stromboli (Stuffed Bread)
recipeIngredient: 3 lb pk frozen bread dough; thaw
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Brush a 11x17 baking sheet with olive oil.
3. Roll dough out on prepared sheet, reaching edges.
4. Arrange salami slices in lengthwise ends.
5. Top with provolone, then capicola.
6. Spread with mustard.
7. Sprinkle with parmesan, garlic salt, oregano, and seasoned salt.
8. Cover with mozzarella.
9. Bring long sides of dough together atop filling and brush with water.
10. Pinch and fold over to close.
11. Brush short ends with water and pinch closed.
12. Bake until golden brown, about 25 minutes. Serve warm.
